title: rubus vahlii
intro: Rubus vahlii, also known as Himalayan Raspberry or Himalaya Bramble, is a shrub native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus vahlii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support cardiovascular health. Rubus vahlii is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
